title: Statichitboxes
description: This is a Hitboxes Mod which helps you in pvp gamemodes like -> nethpot
body: **Hello My bro, Well this is A minecraft mod For you If you are a pvper Or if you wanna improve in minecraft pvp in gamemodes like sword or nethpot well if yes this is the perfect mod for you since what this mod does is if you are looking at a player Or in the reach of the enemy**<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/B88mt5G96dU" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
